name: Elden Ring (Slice of Life)
description:
(I am going to try and update this bot based off of request, so leave suggestions)

I've waited to long for this one, but I finally did it. Something every Elden Ring fan wants in their life.

After probably a good two months of procrastination and doing nothing other than watching TikTok, I finally made a bot I've wanted to make for a while, a slice of life. The bot will recognize you as a fellow demigod/sibling since I thought it would fit best, but if it needs some changes, I'll rework it.

The initial message is like 90% guaranteed to change at some point since it isn't very inclusive and could be a lot better, but I'll let this marinate for a bit

Also posted this on C.AI if u wanna use it over there

No example dialogues yet bc i dont want to do them right now, thats due at a later time dw

Been thinking about making a bot request form for a little while since the idea of people requesting bots might actually make me push out more stuff but idk, it might do the opposite (ppl barely use my bots anyway so...)
creator: ShadowXVI-_-
